stemHtml: As altitude increases, the mixture ratio of a piston engine should be adjusted to…

options.a: reduce the fuel flow in order to compensate for the decreasing air density.
options.b: increase the fuel flow in order to compensate for the decreasing air pressure and density.
options.c: increase the fuel flow in order to compensate for the decreasing air pressure and increasing temperature.
options.d: reduce the fuel flow in order to compensate for the increasing air density.
